name: Chinese Chicken Salad, Low Fat
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chicken breast, cooked, skinless, boneless
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cooked chicken into 1-inch cubes.
2. Mix together the cubed chicken, water chestnuts, and celery in a large bowl.
3. In a small bowl, blend together the sour cream, fat-free dressing, curry powder, soy sauce, and lemon juice until well combined.
4. Pour the blended mixture over the chicken salad ingredients.
5. Stir in any remaining grapes.
6. Chill the salad several hours before serving.
Per serving: Fat 2.2g, Cholesterol 42mg, Calories 158 (13% from fat), Protein 17g, Carbohydrates 14g.
